{% extends "base.html" %} {% block content %}

{{ title }}

{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
{{ form.name.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.name(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.contact_email.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.contact_email(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.phone.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.phone(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.cuisine_type.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.cuisine_type(class="form-select") }}
{{ form.order_deadline.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.order_deadline(class="form-control") }}
{{ form.submit(class="btn btn-dark w-100") }}
{% endblock %}
